inputs.label: Brake Power
inputs.businessContext: Measured brake power from engine dynamometer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured brake power from engine dynamometer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance au frein mesurée sur un dynamomètre moteur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia al freno medida desde el dinamómetro del motor.

inputs.label: Fuel Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fuel consumption rate measured by fuel flow meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fuel consumption rate measured by fuel flow meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt akış ölçer ile ölçülen yakıt tüketim hızı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de consommation de carburant mesuré par un débitmètre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de consumo de combustible medida por el caudalímetro.

inputs.label: Lower Heating Value
inputs.businessContext: Lower heating value of the fuel (energy content).

businessContext_i18n.en: Lower heating value of the fuel (energy content).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pouvoir calorifique inférieur du carburant (contenu énergétique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Poder calorífico inferior del combustible (contenido energético).

inputs.label: Efficiency Correction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to account for environmental or measurement corrections (default 1 for no correction).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to account for environmental or measurement corrections (default 1 for no correction).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çevresel veya ölçüm düzeltmelerini hesaba katan çarpan (düzeltme yok için varsayılan 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Umgebungs- oder Messkorrekturen (Standard 1 für keine Korrektur).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour tenir compte des corrections environnementales ou de mesure (par défaut 1 pour aucune correction).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para tener en cuenta correcciones ambientales o de medición (por defecto 1 sin corrección).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
